patch.value: pm plan: materialize creates dependency cycle; decision/discovery/validation flag mismatch; --steps all unsupported

Dogfood 2026-05-22: (1) CORRECTNESS: pm plan materialize generated a dependency cycle (generated task depends back on the plan; validate then flags the cycle). (2) UX: pm plan decision rejects --decision (actual flag --decision-text; likewise --discovery-text/--validation-text) with no did-you-mean suggestion. (3) pm plan materialize requires --steps and rejects --steps all; agents expect 'all' as the obvious default. Fix the cycle, add flag suggestions, support --steps all.
